    [Documentation](https://workable.readme.io/reference/workable-mcp-server)[Privacy Policy](https://www.workable.com/privacy)[Support](https://help.workable.com/hc/en-us)
    

Connect your AI assistant directly to Workable. With 40+ tools spanning the full hiring lifecycle, you can manage jobs, move candidates through pipeline stages, add reviews and comments, handle requisitions and offers, and access employee and HR data all without leaving your AI interface. Whether you're sourcing talent, tracking approvals, or pulling workforce insights, the Workable MCP server turns natural language into real actions across your recruiting and HR operations.

You can use Workable to:

**End-to-end candidate review:**  
"Show me all candidates for the Account Executive role, give me Edna Renner's full profile, and add a comment that she has strong communication skills."

**Requisition approval workflow:**  
"Show me all pending requisitions, give me the details on REQ1, and approve it."

**Instant hiring snapshot:**  
"How many open jobs do we have, how many candidates are in the Account Executive pipeline, and who was the last person hired into that role?"

**Structured candidate feedback:**  
"Give Lennert Rossler a positive rating with the note 'Strong sales background, excellent culture fit' and move him to the next stage."
